user_task: Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to extract and validate the temperature time series of pure water at 300 K from an energy file.
expected_gromacs_commands: echo Temperature | gmx energy -f nvt.edr -o temperature_nvt.xvg
echo Temperature | gmx energy -f npt.edr -o temperature_npt.xvg
echo Temperature | gmx energy -f md.edr -o temperature_md.xvg
important_rules: Use non-interactive echo-based gmx energy selection.
Explain which energy file belongs to NVT, NPT, and production MD.
Explain that temperature should fluctuate around 300 K after equilibration.
Do not treat a very short trajectory as final proof of equilibration.
Mention that temperature stability alone is not sufficient; density, energy, pressure, and volume should also be checked for full equilibration validation.
common_errors: Not explaining the interactive energy selection.
Assuming temperature stability alone proves full equilibration.
Reporting a short trajectory as final convergence evidence.
validation_note: The workflow is valid if temperature time-series files are extracted and show fluctuations around 300 K after equilibration. Temperature alone is not sufficient for full equilibration validation.
